titles.title: Getting Ready to Leave This World

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Laying up my treasures in that Home above Trusting fully, trusting in the Savior's love Doing what I can for Heaven's holy Dove I'm getting ready to leave this world

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Gettin' ready to leave this world Gettin' ready for the gates of pearl Keeping my record bright Watching both day and night I'm getting ready to leave this world

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Trusting in the riches of His saving grace In each earthly trial, I His love can trace Sure that up in Heaven I shall find a place And I'm getting ready to leave this world

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: To prepare a mansion, Jesus said I'll go If it were not true, I would have told you so Just a little while to linger here below And I'm getting ready to leave this world
